business_ideas.idea: Isomorphic Labs - Google spinout to cure all disease using AI and protein folding
AlphaFold wrapper application for pharmaceutical companies to speed drug discovery
Wet labs for protein synthesis testing to support computational biology discoveries
Computational biology startups - general opportunity for high-potential entrepreneurs

predictions.text: AGI (Artificial General Intelligence) will be the last invention humans need to make
Computational biology will be the most valuable field for high-potential entrepreneurs in next decade
